endpoint.summary: Distribute a total across weighted parts

ProratePart.description: A weighted portion of a total amount.
ProratePart.title: ProratePart

request_schema.description: Request body for prorating a total across weighted parts.

denominator.description: Optional explicit denominator; defaults to sum of weights when omitted
denominator.title: Denominator

parts.description: Weighted parts that receive a share of the total
parts.title: Parts

strict_zero_weights.description: Apply strict validation when all part weights are zero
strict_zero_weights.title: Strict Zero Weights

request_schema.title: ProrateRequest
